title: Solve for an unknown charge
prompt: On the x axis, a +8.0 microcoulomb charge is fixed at x = -0.20 m and a second positive charge of unknown magnitude is fixed at x = +0.20 m. A +3.0 microcoulomb charge at the origin then feels a net electric force of 4.05 N in the +x direction. Find the magnitude of the unknown charge. Use k = 8.99e9 N m^2/C^2.

givens.label: net force on the origin charge
